snippet: @DenisValerievichMayorov, your fine-grained personal access token is expiring soon. Hey DenisValerievichMayorov! We noticed your fine-grained personal access token (GeminiWeatherAction), will expire in
subject: [GitHub] Your fine-grained personal access token is about to expire
body:
Hi DenisValerievichMayorov,

We noticed your fine-grained personal access token "GeminiWeatherAction", will expire in 1 day.

If this token is still needed, visit https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/12647756/regenerate to generate an equivalent.

If you run into problems, please contact support by visiting https://github.com/contact

Thanks,
The GitHub Team
